untranslatable_reason: Double Top pattern requires multi-bar peak detection (two roughly equal highs separated by a valley with specific depth 10-20% and time separation 2-7 weeks). This requires lookback pattern matching across multiple bars to identify the two tops and valley structure, which exceeds point-in-time indicator conditions. The entry conditions also require tracking whether price has already risen above the right top high, necessitating state memory. Current indicator set supports only single-bar and simple multi-bar crossovers, not complex pattern recognition across variable time windows.
